specific_question: In the first two quarters of 2025, how many high-severity vulnerabilities in MediConn’s virtual care platform were remediated after vulnerability assessments performed by the cybersecurity specialist?
answer: Vulnerability tracking dashboards show that the cybersecurity specialist remediated 11 high-severity vulnerabilities between January 1 and June 30, 2025.
dr_question: By Q4 2025, how can MediConn Solutions integrate the HHS Cybersecurity Performance Goals (CPGs) into its virtual healthcare platform to ensure compliance for both internal systems and third-party vendors, while effectively mitigating emerging cyber threats?
